name: argument_reconstruction_skill_pack

source.name: Argument Reconstruction Cheat Sheet Google Sheet

recommended_installation: Copy this repo or the desired skill folders into a GPT configuration, local skills directory, or agent skills directory. Use argument_reconstruction_full/SKILL.md for the complete workflow, or individual modular skills for narrower tool routing.
notes: Each skill includes YAML front matter for name and description.
The full workflow skill contains the complete reconstruction sequence.
The modular skills are designed for targeted agent calls.
The examples folder provides a basic regression fixture for developer testing.
